description: Shared Renovate preset for yschimke Android / Compose / Kotlin repos. Updates are clustered by release train (things that share a version and are ABI-coupled move together); everything else stays small. Extend with { "extends": ["github>yschimke/renovate-config"] }.

packageRules.description: Auto-land patch & minor updates once every CI check on the branch is green. platformAutomerge is false, so Renovate waits for ALL checks (not just branch-protection-required ones) before merging — it cannot merge ahead of CI. A grouped PR only automerges if every update in it qualifies, so any group that happens to contain a major stays manual. To switch to instant GitHub-native merge instead, set platformAutomerge:true here and mark the CI checks required on main via branch protection.
Kotlin compiler train: stdlib, the Kotlin Gradle plugins, the Compose compiler plugin, and KSP all track the compiler version and must bump together.
kotlinx libraries (coroutines, serialization, io, datetime) release independently of the compiler but are co-tested; batch them to cut PR noise.
JetBrains Compose Multiplatform release train plus its lifecycle / navigation companions, which version in lockstep with it.

Catch-all for the remaining, independently-versioned AndroidX libraries (core, activity, datastore, work, navigation3, test, ...). Batched because these small libs rarely break; the release-train groups below deliberately override this for their members.
AndroidX Compose (BOM-aligned) artifacts move together. Overrides the androidx catch-all.
Wear Compose / TV plus Horologist, which tracks the Wear Compose line. Overrides the androidx catch-all.
Room + SQLite + the Room Gradle plugin move together and are KSP-coupled. Overrides the androidx catch-all.
gRPC + protobuf runtime/codegen must move in lockstep.
Give majors extra soak time before opening the PR.
